mapper.select:
/* ====== cmn.login.selectMenuAuth =========*/
SELECT #{SESSION_USER_ID , jdbcType=VARCHAR} USR_ID ,MAX(AUTH_TYPE ) AUTH_TYPE ,MENU_ID ,MENU_NM ,MAX(NVL(CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,'N' )) CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,MAX(NVL(DEL_AUTH ,'N' )) DEL_AUTH ,MAX(NVL(RVISN_AUTH ,'N' )) RVISN_AUTH ,MAX(NVL(SRCH_AUTH ,'N' )) SRCH_AUTH ,MAX(NVL(EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,'N' )) EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,MAX(NVL(PRNT_ABABLE_YN ,'N' )) PRNT_ABABLE_YN --,MAX(HAS_AUTH) HAS_AUTH FROM ( SELECT 'U' AUTH_TYPE ,C.MENU_ID ,C.MENU_NM ,B.CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,B.DEL_AUTH ,B.RVISN_AUTH ,B.SRCH_AUTH ,B.EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,B.PRNT_ABABLE_YN --,DECODE(B.MENU_ID,NULL, 'N','Y') HAS_AUTH FROM CMN_USR_MST A ,CMN_USR_MENU_ASGN_MST B ,CMN_MENU_MST C WHERE A.USR_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ID , jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND B.MENU_ID = C.MENU_ID UNION SELECT 'G' AUTH_TYPE ,E.MENU_ID ,E.MENU_NM ,D.CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,D.DEL_AUTH ,D.RVISN_AUTH ,D.SRCH_AUTH ,D.EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,D.PRNT_ABABLE_YN --,DECODE(D.MENU_ID,NULL, 'N','Y') HAS_AUTH FROM CMN_USR_MST A ,CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST B ,CMN_GRP_AUTH_ASGN_MST C ,CMN_AUTH_MENU_ASGN_MST D ,CMN_MENU_MST E WHERE 1 =1 AND A.USR_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ID , jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* ID0005*/ AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND B.GRP_ID = C.GRP_ID AND C.AUTH_ID = D.AUTH_ID AND D.MENU_ID = E.MENU_ID ) GROUP BY MENU_ID ,MENU_NM ,CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,DEL_AUTH ,RVISN_AUTH ,SRCH_AUTH ,EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,PRNT_ABABLE_YN

/* ====== cmn.login.buttonAuthForCRUD =========*/ SELECT A.*, DECODE(A.PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', 'Y', 'CREAT', CREAT_ABABLE_YN, 'DEL' , DEL_AUTH, 'RVISN', RVISN_AUTH, 'SRCH' , SRCH_AUTH, 'EXEL' , EXEL_ABABLE_YN, 'PRNT' , PRNT_ABABLE_YN, 'ETC' , 'Y', NULL) ALLOW FROM ( with CMN_PRGM_MST_WITH_MAIN as ( SELECT A.*, B.PRGM_ID PRGM_ID_MAIN, B.PRGM_TYPE PRGM_TYPE_MAIN, B.PRGM_URL PRGM_URL_MAIN FROM CMN_PRGM_MST A ,( select * from ( SELECT A.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY MENU_ID order by prgm_id ) row_index FROM CMN_PRGM_MST A WHERE a.PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' ) B where row_index = 1 ) b WHERE A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND B.PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' ) , PRGM_URL_PARAM AS ( SELECT #{pgmUrl} PRGM_URL ,#{SESSION_USER_ID} USR_ID FROM DUAL ) SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT '' USR_ID ,'X' AUTH_TYPE ,M.MENU_ID ,M.MENU_NM ,'' CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,'' DEL_AUTH ,'' RVISN_AUTH ,'' SRCH_AUTH ,'' EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,'' PRNT_ABABLE_YN ,F.PRGM_URL ,F.PRGM_URL_MAIN ,'' GRP_ID ,'' AUTH_ID ,F.PRGM_TYPE ,F.PRGM_TYPE_MAIN --,DECODE(D.MENU_ID,NULL, 'N','Y') HAS_AUTH FROM CMN_MENU_MST M ,CMN_PRGM_MST_WITH_MAIN F ,PRGM_URL_PARAM WHERE 1 =1 AND M.MENU_ID = F.MENU_ID /* AND F.PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' */ AND F.PRGM_URL = PRGM_URL_PARAM.PRGM_URL -- '/cmn/authmgmt/authInsert.json' /* '/cmn/accessLogSrch/form.do'*/ AND ROWNUM = 1 UNION ALL SELECT A.USR_ID ,'U' AUTH_TYPE ,M.MENU_ID ,M.MENU_NM ,MAX(B_MAIN.CREAT_ABABLE_YN) ,MAX(B_MAIN.DEL_AUTH) ,MAX(B_MAIN.RVISN_AUTH) ,MAX(B_MAIN.SRCH_AUTH) ,MAX(B_MAIN.EXEL_ABABLE_YN) ,MAX(B_MAIN.PRNT_ABABLE_YN) ,MAX(D.PRGM_URL) ,MAX(D.PRGM_URL_MAIN) ,'' GRP_ID ,'' AUTH_ID ,MAX(D.PRGM_TYPE) ,MAX(D.PRGM_TYPE_MAIN) --,DECODE(B.MENU_ID,NULL, 'N','Y') HAS_AUTH FROM CMN_USR_MST A ,CMN_USR_MENU_ASGN_MST B ,CMN_USR_MENU_ASGN_MST B_MAIN ,CMN_PRGM_MST_WITH_MAIN D ,CMN_MENU_MST M ,PRGM_URL_PARAM WHERE A.USR_ID = PRGM_URL_PARAM.USR_ID AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND B.MENU_ID = D.MENU_ID AND A.USR_ID = B_MAIN.USR_ID AND B_MAIN.MENU_ID = D.MENU_ID /* AND D.PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' */ AND D.PRGM_URL = PRGM_URL_PARAM.PRGM_URL /* '/cmn/accessLogSrch/form.do'*/ AND M.MENU_ID = D.MENU_ID AND M.USG_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY A.USR_ID ,M.MENU_ID ,M.MENU_NM ,d.PRGM_URL UNION SELECT A.USR_ID ,'G' AUTH_TYPE ,M.MENU_ID ,M.MENU_NM ,MAX(D_MAIN.CREAT_ABABLE_YN) ,MAX(D_MAIN.DEL_AUTH) ,MAX(D_MAIN.RVISN_AUTH) ,MAX(D_MAIN.SRCH_AUTH) ,MAX(D_MAIN.EXEL_ABABLE_YN) ,MAX(D_MAIN.PRNT_ABABLE_YN) ,MAX(F.PRGM_URL) ,MAX(F.PRGM_URL_MAIN) ,MAX(B.GRP_ID) ,MAX(C.AUTH_ID) ,MAX(F.PRGM_TYPE) ,MAX(F.PRGM_TYPE_MAIN) --,DECODE(D.MENU_ID,NULL, 'N','Y') HAS_AUTH FROM CMN_USR_MST A ,CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST B ,CMN_GRP_AUTH_ASGN_MST C ,CMN_AUTH_MENU_ASGN_MST D ,CMN_AUTH_MENU_ASGN_MST D_MAIN ,CMN_PRGM_MST_WITH_MAIN F ,CMN_MENU_MST M ,CMN_USR_GRP_MST G ,CMN_AUTH_MST AU ,PRGM_URL_PARAM WHERE 1 =1 AND A.USR_ID = PRGM_URL_PARAM.USR_ID AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND B.GRP_ID = C.GRP_ID AND C.AUTH_ID = D.AUTH_ID AND D.MENU_ID = F.MENU_ID AND C.AUTH_ID = D_MAIN.AUTH_ID AND D_MAIN.MENU_ID = F.MENU_ID /* AND F.PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' */ AND F.PRGM_URL = PRGM_URL_PARAM.PRGM_URL /* '/cmn/accessLogSrch/form.do'*/ AND M.MENU_ID = F.MENU_ID AND M.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.GRP_ID = G.GRP_ID AND G.USG_YN = 'Y' AND C.AUTH_ID = AU.AUTH_ID AND AU.USG_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY A.USR_ID ,M.MENU_ID ,M.MENU_NM ,F.PRGM_URL ORDER BY AUTH_TYPE DESC ) A WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.AUTH_TYPE DESC ) A

/* ====== cmn.login.selectMenuAuthForURLxxxxxxxxxxx =========*/ SELECT MAX(USR_ID ) USR_ID ,MAX(AUTH_TYPE ) AUTH_TYPE ,MENU_ID ,MENU_NM ,MAX(NVL(CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,'N' )) CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,MAX(NVL(DEL_AUTH ,'N' )) DEL_AUTH ,MAX(NVL(RVISN_AUTH ,'N' )) RVISN_AUTH ,MAX(NVL(SRCH_AUTH ,'N' )) SRCH_AUTH ,MAX(NVL(EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,'N' )) EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,MAX(NVL(PRNT_ABABLE_YN ,'N' )) PRNT_ABABLE_YN --,MAX(HAS_AUTH) HAS_AUTH FROM ( SELECT A.USR_ID ,'U' AUTH_TYPE ,C.MENU_ID ,C.MENU_NM ,B.CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,B.DEL_AUTH ,B.RVISN_AUTH ,B.SRCH_AUTH ,B.EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,B.PRNT_ABABLE_YN --,DECODE(B.MENU_ID,NULL, 'N','Y') HAS_AUTH FROM CMN_USR_MST A ,CMN_USR_MENU_ASGN_MST B ,CMN_MENU_MST C ,CMN_PRGM_MST D WHERE A.USR_ID(+) = #{SESSION_USER_ID} AND A.USR_ID(+) = B.USR_ID AND B.MENU_ID(+) = C.MENU_ID AND C.MENU_ID(+) = D.MENU_ID /* AND D.PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' */ AND D.PRGM_URL = #{pgmUrl} /* '/cmn/accessLogSrch/form.do'*/ UNION SELECT A.USR_ID ,'G' AUTH_TYPE ,E.MENU_ID ,E.MENU_NM ,D.CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,D.DEL_AUTH ,D.RVISN_AUTH ,D.SRCH_AUTH ,D.EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,D.PRNT_ABABLE_YN --,DECODE(D.MENU_ID,NULL, 'N','Y') HAS_AUTH FROM CMN_USR_MST A ,CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST B ,CMN_GRP_AUTH_ASGN_MST C ,CMN_AUTH_MENU_ASGN_MST D ,CMN_MENU_MST E ,CMN_PRGM_MST F WHERE 1 =1 AND A.USR_ID(+) = #{SESSION_USER_ID} AND A.USR_ID(+) = B.USR_ID AND B.GRP_ID(+) = C.GRP_ID AND C.AUTH_ID(+) = D.AUTH_ID AND D.MENU_ID(+) = E.MENU_ID AND E.MENU_ID(+) = F.MENU_ID /* AND F.PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' */ AND F.PRGM_URL = #{pgmUrl} /* '/cmn/accessLogSrch/form.do'*/ ) GROUP BY MENU_ID ,MENU_NM ,CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,DEL_AUTH ,RVISN_AUTH ,SRCH_AUTH ,EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,PRNT_ABABLE_YN

/* ====== cmn.login.usrGrpAuthForButton =========*/
SELECT DISTINCT A.USR_ID /* , B.GRP_ID */ , C.AUTH_ID FROM CMN_USR_MST A ,CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST B ,CMN_GRP_AUTH_ASGN_MST C WHERE 1 =1 AND A.USR_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ID , jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* ID0005*/ AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND B.GRP_ID = C.GRP_ID AND C.AUTH_ID = #{authId , jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* ID0005*/

/* ====== cmn.login.usrGrpAuthListForButton =========*/ SELECT DISTINCT A.USR_ID /* , B.GRP_ID */ , C.AUTH_ID FROM CMN_USR_MST A ,CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST B ,CMN_GRP_AUTH_ASGN_MST C WHERE 1 =1 AND A.USR_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ID , jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* ID0005*/ AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND B.GRP_ID = C.GRP_ID

/* ====== cmn.login.chkUsrGrpAuthListForButton =========*/ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT A.USR_ID , C.AUTH_ID FROM CMN_USR_MST A , CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST B , CMN_GRP_AUTH_ASGN_MST C WHERE 1 =1 AND A.USR_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ID , jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND B.GRP_ID = C.GRP_ID AND C.AUTH_ID = #{AUTH_ID , jdbcType=VARCHAR}) T

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.buttonAuthChk =========*/ SELECT MAX(CREAT_ABABLE_YN) AS CREAT_YN , MAX(DEL_AUTH) AS DEL_YN , MAX(RVISN_AUTH) AS RVISN_YN , MAX(SRCH_AUTH) AS SRCH_YN , MAX(EXEL_ABABLE_YN) AS EXEL_YN , MAX(PRNT_ABABLE_YN) AS PRNT_YN FROM ( SELECT A.AUTH_ID , D.AUTH_NM , D.USG_YN AUTH_USG_YN , DECODE(A.PRGM_TYPE, 'MAIN','메인', 'SRCH','검색','CREAT','등록','RVISN','변경','DEL','삭제','EXEL','엑셀','PRNT','출력','ETC','기타') PRGM_TYPE , PRGM_NM , DECODE(A.PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN','Y','CREAT',CREAT_ABABLE_YN,'DEL',DEL_AUTH,'RVISN',RVISN_AUTH,'SRCH',SRCH_AUTH,'EXEL',EXEL_ABABLE_YN,'PRNT',PRNT_ABABLE_YN,'ETC','Y',NULL) ALLOW , DECODE(PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', CREAT_ABABLE_YN,'CREAT', CREAT_ABABLE_YN, NULL) CREAT_ABABLE_YN , DECODE(PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', DEL_AUTH,'DEL', DEL_AUTH, NULL) DEL_AUTH , DECODE(PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', RVISN_AUTH,'RVISN', RVISN_AUTH, NULL) RVISN_AUTH , DECODE(PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', SRCH_AUTH,'SRCH', SRCH_AUTH, NULL) SRCH_AUTH , DECODE(PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', EXEL_ABABLE_YN,'EXEL', EXEL_ABABLE_YN, NULL) EXEL_ABABLE_YN , DECODE(PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', PRNT_ABABLE_YN,'PRNT', PRNT_ABABLE_YN, NULL) PRNT_ABABLE_YN FROM ( WITH CMN_PRGM_MST_WITH_MAIN AS ( SELECT A.*, B.PRGM_ID PRGM_ID_MAIN, B.PRGM_TYPE PRGM_TYPE_MAIN, B.PRGM_URL PRGM_URL_MAIN FROM CMN_PRGM_MST A , ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY MENU_ID ORDER BY PRGM_ID ) ROW_INDEX FROM CMN_PRGM_MST A WHERE A.PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' ) B WHERE ROW_INDEX = 1 ) B WHERE A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND B.PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' ) , PRGM_URL_PARAM AS (SELECT #{SESSION_USER_ID} USR_ID FROM DUAL) SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT A.USR_ID , '사용자권한' AUTH_TYPE , M.MENU_ID , M.MENU_NM , B_MAIN.CREAT_ABABLE_YN , B_MAIN.DEL_AUTH , B_MAIN.RVISN_AUTH , B_MAIN.SRCH_AUTH , B_MAIN.EXEL_ABABLE_YN , B_MAIN.PRNT_ABABLE_YN , D.PRGM_NM , D.PRGM_URL , D.PRGM_URL_MAIN , '' GRP_ID , '' AUTH_ID , D.PRGM_TYPE , D.PRGM_TYPE_MAIN FROM CMN_USR_MST A , CMN_USR_MENU_ASGN_MST B , CMN_USR_MENU_ASGN_MST B_MAIN , CMN_PRGM_MST_WITH_MAIN D , CMN_MENU_MST M , PRGM_URL_PARAM WHERE A.USR_ID = PRGM_URL_PARAM.USR_ID AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND B.MENU_ID = D.MENU_ID AND A.USR_ID = B_MAIN.USR_ID AND B_MAIN.MENU_ID = D.MENU_ID AND M.MENU_ID = D.MENU_ID UNION SELECT A.USR_ID , '그룹권한' AUTH_TYPE , M.MENU_ID , M.MENU_NM , D_MAIN.CREAT_ABABLE_YN , D_MAIN.DEL_AUTH , D_MAIN.RVISN_AUTH , D_MAIN.SRCH_AUTH , D_MAIN.EXEL_ABABLE_YN , D_MAIN.PRNT_ABABLE_YN , F.PRGM_NM , F.PRGM_URL , F.PRGM_URL_MAIN , B.GRP_ID , C.AUTH_ID , F.PRGM_TYPE , F.PRGM_TYPE_MAIN FROM CMN_USR_MST A , CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST B , CMN_GRP_AUTH_ASGN_MST C , CMN_AUTH_MENU_ASGN_MST D , CMN_AUTH_MENU_ASGN_MST D_MAIN , CMN_PRGM_MST_WITH_MAIN F , CMN_MENU_MST M , PRGM_URL_PARAM WHERE 1 =1 AND A.USR_ID = PRGM_URL_PARAM.USR_ID AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND B.GRP_ID = C.GRP_ID AND C.AUTH_ID = D.AUTH_ID AND D.MENU_ID = F.MENU_ID AND C.AUTH_ID = D_MAIN.AUTH_ID AND D_MAIN.MENU_ID = F.MENU_ID AND M.MENU_ID = F.MENU_ID ) A WHERE 1=1 ) A , CMN_MENU_MST B , CMN_USR_GRP_MST C , CMN_AUTH_MST D WHERE 1 =1 AND A.MENU_ID(+) = B.MENU_ID AND A.GRP_ID = C.GRP_ID(+) AND A.AUTH_ID = D.AUTH_ID(+) AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.MENU_ID = #{AUTH_MENU_ID} )

SELECT MENU_ID , MENU_NM FROM CMN_MENU_MST WHERE 1=1 START WITH MENU_ID =(SELECT MENU_ID from CMN_PRGM_MST WHERE PRGM_URL = #{pgmUrl} AND PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' AND USG_YN = 'Y') CONNECT BY PRIOR HGHR_MENU_ID = MENU_ID ORDER BY MENU_LVL ASC
